dashboardSubtitle: Ga takaitaccen bayani kan abokin lafiyar fatar jikinka.
advancedAiAnalysisDesc: Samu cikakken kimantawar haɗarin raunukan fatar jikinka da AI ɗinmu na zamani, wanda aka ƙarfafa da Bio-LLM na musamman.

askBioLLMDesc: Kana da tambaya? AI ɗinmu na likitanci zai iya taimakawa.
uvEnvironmentDesc: Duba maki haɗarin fata na ainihin lokaci dangane da wurinka.
teleDermHubDesc: Haɗu da ƙwararrun likitocin fata nan take.
geneticRiskAnalyzerDesc: Hasashen yiwuwar kamuwarka da cutar melanoma ta gado.
dermatologyDigitalTwinDesc: Duba samfurin kama-da-wane na lafiyar fatar jikinka a kan lokaci.

recommendations.lagos: Kada ka wuce minti 8 a cikin rana kai tsaye. Shafa SPF 30+ kowane sa'o'i 2.

recommendations.nairobi: Rage fuskantar rana tsakanin karfe 10 na safe zuwa 4 na yamma. Saka tufafi masu kariya.
